name: logistics operators managing 50–100 shipments/month tool
description: For logistics operators managing 50–100 shipments/month, mismatches cause late orders. We automate cross-checking instead of manual cross-checking of logs and receipts.
problem_solved: mismatches between shipment logs and warehouse receipts
